tasks.subject: Run epic-5-infrastructure via kb-run-epic workflow
tasks.description: Execute the epic located at .spec/prd/subscriptions-redesign/tasks/epic-5-infrastructure by following the kb-run-epic skill: validate files, parse dependencies, create all task entries, then dispatch ready tasks/reviewers and summarize results. Note: source path is under .spec/prd/.../tasks rather than .spec/tasks/.

tasks.subject: Create pi-tasks entries for epic-5-infrastructure spec tasks
tasks.description: Create task board entries for all actionable tasks in .spec/prd/subscriptions-redesign/tasks/epic-5-infrastructure, skipping already completed tasks unless force is requested. Preserve dependencies and assignee mapping from the spec/EPIC.md.

tasks.subject: Dispatch ready epic-5-infrastructure implementation tasks
tasks.description: Dispatch ready tasks from epic-5-infrastructure to appropriate subagents after the planning phase, then collect results and reviewer verdicts per kb-run-epic workflow. Blocked because TaskExecute/pi-subagents execution is unavailable in the current session.

tasks.subject: Summarize epic-5-infrastructure execution results
tasks.description: After planning/dispatching, summarize approved, rejected, pending, and skipped tasks for epic-5-infrastructure and note any path/layout deviations from the standard kb-run-epic workflow.
